title: Connecting content to PostLiterate thesis
first_prompt: Summarize this for me, high level, also relate it to my PostLIterate book thesis.
summary: Irwin was attempting to relate the academic concept of L2 reading strategies to his broader theoretical framework, *PostLiterate*. The conversation began with the assistant summarizing the Parry paper, which contrasted the top-down reading strategies of Nigerian students with the bottom-up parsing employed by university-educated teachers in China. When Irwin sought further clarification, the assistant defined L2 as meaning second language.
